What We Do

Source. Improve. Sell.

01

Source & Inspect

We hunt quality pre-owned items across Kigali — cars, bikes, phones, furniture, and more. Every item is physically inspected before listing.

02

Repair & Upgrade

We fix what's broken, clean what's dirty, and upgrade what can be better. You get more value for your money — always.

03

List & Sell

Every item gets listed on Facebook Marketplace with real photos, honest descriptions, and fair pricing. No stock photos, no hidden faults.

04

Pickup or Deliver

Inspect in person in Kigali. Pay only when you're happy. Delivery available across the city.

f
